header.description: P-51 flies wings-level at 1 g (no bank, gamma stays 0) through a throttle program that exercises the longitudinal-energy model: idle to settle, full throttle to accelerate toward the thrust=drag equilibrium, then a chop to idle to decelerate toward the V_MIN floor. With g=1 wings level this is PURE longitudinal flight (B2 reduces to B1 here, modulo the appended gamma=0 state), pinning the energy integrator bit-for-bit.
